verses.text: David tua lai panin kihemkhia-in Adullam leihawmah tai hi. A sanggamte leh a pa' innkuante khempeuh in a zak uh ciangin ama kiang tua lai munah paisuk uh hi

Tua ciangin a lungkham mi khempeuh, leiba a nei mi khempeuh, leh a lungkimlo mite khempeuh ama kiangah hong kikhawm uh hi. Amah pen amaute tungah a ukpa a suak hi. Tua lai-ah amah tawh mihing za li bang a om hi

Tua lai mun panin Moab gam Mizpah-ah David a pai hi. Amah in Moab kumpipa kiangah, “Pasian in kei-a' dingin hong sepsak ding ka theih matengin ka nu leh ka pa na kiangah hong omsak in, ci-in kong thum hi,” a ci hi
Amah in Moab kumpipa kiangah amaute nusia a, munmuan'huaina sungah David a om sungteng amah tawh omkhawm uh hi
Tua ciangin kamsangpa Gad in David kiangah, “Munmuan'huai sungah om nawn kei in; kihem in la, Judah gamah pai in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David kihemkhia-in Hereth tulakah a pai hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Saul in Nob khua Siampite That

verses.text: Tu-in David leh amah tawh a om mite a kimuhna thu Saul in za hi. A khutsungah a teipi tawi-in, a nasemte khempeuh a kimkotah dingin Gibeah khua a sangna mun makeng kung nuai-ah Saul a tu hi

Tua ciangin Saul in a kimkotah a ding a nasemte kiangah, “Tu-in za un, no Benjamin-te aw; Jessi' tapa in note khempeuh' lote leh leenggui lote hong pia-in, note khempeuh a tul a uk, a za a ukin hong koih dingin um a

note khempeuh in kei hong sawmsim na hi uh hiam? Tuni-a bangin hong pangsim dingin ka tapa in Jessi' tapa tawh thukimna a bawl ciangin kuamah in kei kiangah hong pulak loin, ka tapa in keimah a do dingin ka nasempa a hanthotna-ah note kuamah dahloin, kei kiangah zong nong pulak kei uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Saul' nasemte' kiangah a ding, Edom mi Doeg in dawngin, “Ahitub' tapa Amalek' kiang, Nob khua-ah Jessi' tapa a pai ka mu a
amah in ama-a' dingin Topa' tungah thu dotsakin, anletui pia a, Filistia mi Goliath' namsau ama tungah pia hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in Ahitub' tapa siampi Ahimelek leh a pa' innkuante ahi Nob-a om siampi khempeuh a sam dingin mi sawl a, kumpipa kiangah amaute khempeuh hong pai uh hi
Tua ciangin Saul in, “Ahitub' tapa aw, tu-in za in,” a ci hi. Amah in dawngin, “Hih lai-ah om ing, topa aw,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Saul in ama kiangah, “Tuni-a bangin hong pangsimin kei a do dingin hong kipat theihna dingin bang hangin nang leh Jessi' tapa in kei hong sawmsim a, ama tungah an leh namsau pia-in, ama-a' dingin Pasian kiangah thu dotsak na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Ahimelek in kumpipa dawngin, “Na nasemte khempeuh lak panin kumpipa' makpa ahi nangmah hong cingte a ukpa David bangin kua thumanin, na inn sungah kua kipahtawi ahi hiam

Ama-a' dingin Pasian' kiangah thu ka dotsak a masa pen tuni ahi hiam? Hilo hi. Kumpipa in a nasempa ahi a, ka pa' innkuante khempeuh ahi zongin ngawh kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh na nasempa in a tam hita leh a tawm hita leh hih thu khempeuh bangmah theilo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Ahimelek aw, nang leh na pa' innkuante na si taktak ding uh hi,” a ci hi

Kumpipa in ama kiimah a ding a cingte kiangah, “Kihei un la Topa' siampite that un; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute zong David tawh pangkhawm uh a, amaute in ama tailam thei napi-in kei kiangah hong pulaklo uh hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin kumpipa' nasemte in Topa' siampite tung a tu dingin a khut uh taangkhiasak lo uh hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in Doeg kiangah, “Kihei in la, siampite hih in,” a ci hi. Edom mi Doeg kihei-in siampite hih a, tua ni-in saihadial siampipuan a silh mihing sawmgiat leh nga a that hi
Amah in siampite' khuapi Nob khua sunga om nuntakna a nei khempeuh numei leh pasal, naupang leh nawine, bawngtalte, late leh tuute, namsau tawh a that khin hi
Ahih hangin Ahitub' tapa Ahimelek' tapate lakah Abiathar a kici khat suakta-in David kiangah a tai hi
Saul in Topa' siampite a thah khitna thu Abiathar in David kiangah a gen hi
David in Abiathar kiangah, “Tua ni-in Doeg tua lai-ah om ahih ciangin Saul' kiangah gen taktak ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi. Na pa' innkuanpih mite khempeuh' sihna ka piangsakkha hi
Kei tawh hong om in; lau kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh kei a that dingin a hong zongte in nang zong thah dingin a hong zong ahi hi; kei kiangah om lecin lungmuan'na sunga om na hi ding hi,” a ci hi.
